# Login and Dashboard Check

<!-- Generated by dd2md from Datadog Synthetics -->
<!-- Source: simple.json -->

## Steps
1. Navigate to login page https://app.example.com/login
2. Fill email field with "user@example.com"
3. Fill password field with "secret123"
4. Click the login button
5. Check URL contains dashboard
6. Welcome banner should be visible
7. Verify the page contains user name
